name: Naman Gabani
title: IT Support Analyst
bio: IT Support Analyst with 1+ years of hands-on deskside and onsite support experience in enterprise environments.
Experienced in troubleshooting hardware, software, networking, Microsoft 365, and Active Directory issues for 50+ end-users while maintaining SLA targets.

experience.title: Desktop Support Engineer (Contract)
description: Delivered onsite L1 desktop, AV, and network support in enterprise environments supporting Wipro/Microsoft end users and client operations.
Resolved urgent and high-priority service tickets within SLA timelines using ServiceNow.
Troubleshot Windows 10/11, Microsoft 365, VPN, LAN/Wi-Fi, and hardware issues.
Deployed and configured endpoint devices (imaging, provisioning, user setup).
Supported Teams Rooms and conferencing systems (Webex, Zoom) for meeting readiness.

experience.title: IT & Operations Coordinator
description: Managed 10+ daily service requests across desktops, laptops, and user accounts.
Handled onboarding/offboarding including device setup and account provisioning for 10+ users weekly.
Supported Active Directory user access, permissions, and troubleshooting.
Tracked IT assets and contributed to internal knowledge base documentation.
Coordinated with L2/L3 teams for escalation and issue resolution.

projects.title: Enterprise Network Infrastructure Setup
projects.subtitle: Windows Server and Active Directory lab environment
projects.desc1: Designed and deployed a simulated enterprise network infrastructure.
projects.desc2: Implemented Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, and workstation deployment in a multi-user environment.
description: Built a full enterprise-style network environment using Windows Server.
Configured Active Directory for user and group management.
Set up DNS and DHCP services for internal network operations.
Performed workstation imaging and troubleshooting in a simulated enterprise setup.

projects.title: Cloud Migration Strategy & Implementation
projects.subtitle: Hybrid migration to Microsoft 365 and Azure AD
projects.desc1: Designed a cloud migration strategy for enterprise environment.
projects.desc2: Supported identity and access migration to Microsoft 365 and Azure AD.
description: Planned and supported migration from on-prem systems to Microsoft 365.
Worked with Azure AD (Entra ID) for identity management and authentication.
Troubleshot Outlook, Teams, and login-related issues post-migration.
Validated user access and system functionality after migration.

projects.title: IT Asset & Service Management (ServiceNow)
projects.subtitle: ITIL-based CMDB and incident workflow simulation
projects.desc1: Configured ITSM workflows and CMDB in ServiceNow.
projects.desc2: Simulated asset lifecycle and incident management processes.
description: Configured CMDB for IT asset tracking and management.
Simulated incident and request workflows aligned with ITIL.
Managed asset lifecycle from provisioning to retirement.
Created reports and dashboards for IT service tracking.

projects.title: End-User Support & Troubleshooting Lab
projects.subtitle: Windows, M365, and network troubleshooting environment
projects.desc1: Simulated real-world IT support scenarios for end-users.
projects.desc2: Focused on troubleshooting Windows, M365, and network issues.
description: Simulated helpdesk environment for resolving user IT issues.
Troubleshot Windows login, performance, and software issues.
Resolved Microsoft 365 issues including Outlook and Teams.
Handled VPN and network connectivity troubleshooting scenarios.
